
```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
makeWidth = function(inputWidth) {
  if (inputWidth>826) {
    return 392
  }
  else {
    return (width-100) / 2
  }
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
germanLocale = d3.formatLocale({
  decimal: ",",
  thousands: "",
  grouping: [3], 
  currency: ["€", " "],
})

hexToRgb = function(hex) {
  const bigint = parseInt(hex.replace(/^#/, ""), 16)
  const r = (bigint >> 16) & 255
  const g = (bigint >> 8) & 255
  const b = bigint & 255
  return `(${r}, ${g}, ${b})`
}
```

```{ojs}
//| echo: false
//| warning: false
//| output: false
colors = [
  "#72bb6f",
  "#559bd5",
  "#f3d039",
  "#c3423f", 
  "#12a7e7",
  "#96b428",
  "#559e8f",
  "#f3d039",
  "#559e8f",
  "#2d5b5e",
]
colors_diverging = [
  "#2d76b3", 
  "#559bd5", 
  "#99c4e6",
  "#bbd7ee", 
  "#ddebf7", 
  "#e3f1e2", 
  "#c7e3c6", 
  "#abd6a9", 
  "#72bb6f", 
  "#4b9847",
]
colors_npr = [
  "#D62021",
  "#000000",
  "#237BBD",
]
colors_burger = [
  "#D62300",
  "#F5EBDC",
  "#FFAA00",
  // "#703a28", // lighter
  "#FF8732",
  // "#F5EBDC",
  "#198737",
  "#FFAA00",
]
colors_oekostrom = [
  "#05a56f",
  "#eb6761",
  "#b4e800",
  "#26c4d3",
  "#d28cec",
  "#aaaaaa",
  "#ffffff",
  "#ffd925"
]
colors_fiw = [
  "#3e5ba2", // deep blue
  "#df5154", // vibrant red
  "#4caf50", // green
  "#ffb74d", // orange
  "#9575cd", // purple
  "#26c6da", // cyan
  "#f06292", // pink
  "#ffd54f"  // yellow
]

// Lebensmittel (Food - Meal / Cloche)
path1 = "M7.5,15.75 m-1.5,0 a1.5,1.5 0 1,0 3,0 a1.5,1.5 0 1,0 -3,0 M3,12 v7.5 h9.075 c0-0.15-0.075-0.225-0.075-0.375 c0-1.05,0.825-1.875,1.875-1.875 s1.875,0.825,1.875,1.875 c0,0.15,0,0.225-0.075,0.375 H21 V12 M21,12 c0-4.125-3.375-7.5-7.5-7.5 h0 L3,12 h10.5 M15.75,12 m-2.25,0 a2.25,2.25 0 1,0 4.5,0 a2.25,2.25 0 1,0 -4.5,0"

// Wohnen (Housing)
path2 = "M10 20v-6h4v6h5v-8h3L12 3 2 12h3v8z"

// Energie (Energy)
path3 = "M9 21c0 .55.45 1 1 1h4c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1H9v1zm3-19C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9c0 2.38 1.19 4.47 3 5.74V17c0 .55.45 1 1 1h6c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-2.26c1.81-1.27 3-3.36 3-5.74 0-3.86-3.14-7-7-7z"

// Mobilität (Mobility)
path4 = "M18.92 6.01C18.72 5.42 18.16 5 17.5 5h-11c-.66 0-1.21.42-1.42 1.01L3 12v8c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-1h12v1c0 .55.45 1 1 1h1c.55 0 1-.45 1-1v-8l-2.08-5.99zM6.5 16c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5S5.67 13 6.5 13s1.5.67 1.5 1.5S7.33 16 6.5 16zm11 0c-.83 0-1.5-.67-1.5-1.5s.67-1.5 1.5-1.5 1.5.67 1.5 1.5-.67 1.5-1.5 1.5zM5 11l1.5-4.5h11L19 11H5z"

// Güter (Goods) - Gift box
path5 = "M12,21 L12,7.5 M16.275,4.5 H18.75 c0.825,0 1.5,0.675 1.5,1.5 v13.5 c0,0.825 -0.675,1.5 -1.5,1.5 H5.25 c-0.825,0 -1.5,-0.675 -1.5,-1.5 V6 c0,-0.825 0.675,-1.5 1.5,-1.5 h2.475 M14.25,12.75 L18,12.75 M12,3 L7.5,3 L7.5,9.75 L12,7.5 L16.5,9.75 L16.5,3 Z M7.5,3 L12,7.5 L16.5,3"

// Dienstleistungen (Services) - Wrench
path6 = "M1 19.894a3.1 3.1 0 0 0 3.098 3.102 3.149 3.149 0 0 0 2.232-.933l10.268-11.938a1.451 1.451 0 0 1 .535-.343.898.898 0 0 1 .088 0 3.932 3.932 0 0 0 3.668-.573 6.235 6.235 0 0 0 2.106-3.958.621.621 0 0 0-.108-.442l-.113-.141-.11-.06a.647.647 0 0 0-.704.06l-2.88 2.239-1.244-.927-.6-1.531 2.889-2.245a.652.652 0 0 0 .237-.644l-.045-.17-.073-.096a.638.638 0 0 0-.42-.241 6.047 6.047 0 0 0-4.32 1.032 4.209 4.209 0 0 0-1.222 4.789 6.976 6.976 0 0 1-.44.593L1.91 17.697A3.085 3.085 0 0 0 1 19.895z"

// Emissionen (Emissions - Factory with smoke)
path7 = "M 7 31 a 1.27 1.27 0 0 0 0 3 L 7 55 H 14 V 34 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 14 31 l 0 -4 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 15.24 26 V 24.8 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 14 23.54 H 6.84 a 1.26 1.26 0 0 0 -1.26 1.26 V 26 a 1.26 1.26 0 0 0 1.26 1.26 h 0.1 Z M 10.27 21.43 A 2.46 2.46 0 0 0 12 20.7 a 2.42 2.42 0 0 0 0.51 -0.76 A 3.55 3.55 0 0 0 15 18.88 A 3.46 3.46 0 0 0 16 17 a 4 4 0 1 0 -3.07 -6.83 a 4 4 0 0 0 -1.17 2.59 a 3.68 3.68 0 0 0 -1.86 1 a 3.63 3.63 0 0 0 -1 3.17 a 3.92 3.92 0 0 0 -0.33 0.27 A 2.49 2.49 0 0 0 7.8 19 a 2.48 2.48 0 0 0 2.47 2.47 Z"

// Half shapes (simplified left-half representations)

// Food - left half of cloche
path1_half = "M7.5,15.75 m-1.5,0 a1.5,1.5 0 1,0 3,0 a1.5,1.5 0 1,0 -3,0 M3,12 v7.5 h9.075 L12,19.5 L12,12 M12,12 c0,-4.125 -1.5,-7.5 -6,-7.5 h0 L3,12 h9"

// Housing - left half of house
path2_half = "M12 3L2 12H5V20H10V14H12V12V3Z"

// Energy - left half of lightbulb
path3_half = "M12 2C8.14 2 5 5.14 5 9C5 11.38 6.19 13.47 8 14.74V17C8 17.55 8.45 18 9 18H12V22H12V18H12V14.74V9V2Z"

// Mobility - left half of car
path4_half = "M12 5H6.5C5.67 5 5.11 5.42 4.91 6.01L3 12V20C3 20.55 3.45 21 4 21H5C5.55 21 6 20.55 6 20V19H12V20V12V5ZM6.5 16C5.67 16 5 15.33 5 14.5S5.67 13 6.5 13S8 13.67 8 14.5S7.33 16 6.5 16ZM5 11L6.5 6.5H12V11H5Z"

// Goods - left half of gift box
path5_half = "M12,21 L12,7.5 M7.725,4.5 H5.25 c-0.825,0 -1.5,0.675 -1.5,1.5 v13.5 c0,0.825 0.675,1.5 1.5,1.5 h6.75 v-21 M7.5,3 L7.5,9.75 L12,7.5 L12,3 Z M7.5,3 L12,7.5"

// Services - left half of wrench
path6_half = "M 1 19.894 a 3.1 3.1 0 0 0 3.098 3.102 a 3.149 3.149 0 0 0 2.232 -0.933 l 10.268 -11.938 a 6.976 6.976 0 0 1 -2.598 -3.125 L 1.91 17.697 A 3.085 3.085 0 0 0 1 19.895 z"

// Emissions - left half of factory
path7_half = "M 7 48 a 1.27 1.27 0 0 0 0 3 L 7 55 H 14 V 51 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 14 48 l 0 -4 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 15.24 43 V 41.8 A 1.25 1.25 0 0 0 14 40.54 H 6.84 a 1.26 1.26 0 0 0 -1.26 1.26 V 43 a 1.26 1.26 0 0 0 1.26 1.26 h 0.1 Z M 10.27 38.43 A 2.46 2.46 0 0 0 12 37.7 a 2.42 2.42 0 0 0 0.51 -0.76 A 3.55 3.55 0 0 0 15 35.88 A 3.46 3.46 0 0 0 16 34 a 4 4 0 1 0 -3.07 -6.83 a 4 4 0 0 0 -1.17 2.59 a 3.68 3.68 0 0 0 -1.86 1 a 3.63 3.63 0 0 0 -1 3.17 a 3.92 3.92 0 0 0 -0.33 0.27 A 2.49 2.49 0 0 0 7.8 36 a 2.48 2.48 0 0 0 2.47 2.47 Z"

// Person (Human figure - Neurath style)
path_neurath = "M106.40 516.35 c-1 -0.35 -2 -0.80 -2.25 -1 -0.20 -0.25 -0.55 -4.05 -0.75 -8.50 -0.50 -13 -1.90 -32.45 -2.90 -40.35 -0.25 -2.05 -0.70 -7 -1 -11 -0.30 -4 -0.90 -11.05 -1.35 -15.75 -0.45 -4.65 -0.90 -10.35 -1 -12.60 -0.15 -2.30 -0.40 -4.15 -0.65 -4.15 -0.20 0 -0.50 1.65 -0.65 3.65 -0.20 3.25 -0.90 10.50 -2.35 25.60 -0.75 7.35 -1.45 15.20 -2 22.50 -0.25 3.30 -0.95 10.05 -1.50 15 -0.55 4.95 -1 11.95 -1 15.60 0 7.25 -0.45 8.95 -2.45 9.55 -0.70 0.20 -5.90 0.30 -11.55 0.25 -5.65 -0.05 -20.85 -0.15 -33.80 -0.25 -18.85 -0.15 -23.75 -0.30 -24.40 -0.85 -1.25 -1.05 -1.05 -5.25 0.45 -8.50 1.75 -3.70 4.95 -7.35 7.40 -8.50 3.55 -1.55 4.30 -2.80 4.90 -7.85 0.25 -2.45 0.55 -9.15 0.65 -14.95 0.20 -10.80 0.85 -19.90 1.85 -26 0.30 -1.90 0.75 -4.60 1 -6 0.20 -1.35 0.40 -4.85 0.45 -7.75 0 -2.90 0.50 -8.60 1.05 -12.75 0.55 -4.10 1.20 -11.30 1.45 -16 0.25 -4.65 0.65 -10.40 0.95 -12.75 0.30 -2.35 0.75 -6.85 1.05 -10 0.25 -3.15 0.75 -7.75 1.05 -10.25 0.25 -2.45 0.70 -7.10 0.95 -10.25 0.70 -8.45 1.35 -14.25 2.15 -18.75 0.90 -5 1.75 -10.60 2.45 -16.65 0.65 -5.65 0.50 -5.85 -5.35 -8.60 -2.20 -1 -5.35 -3 -7 -4.40 -1.65 -1.45 -3.15 -2.60 -3.30 -2.60 -0.75 0 -5.15 -6.30 -5.70 -8.15 -0.35 -1.15 -1.40 -3.65 -2.30 -5.60 -1.50 -3.20 -1.65 -3.85 -1.65 -8.75 -0.05 -6.35 0.60 -42.15 1.05 -60.50 0.40 -15.55 0.40 -15.55 -0.35 -20.75 -0.55 -4.15 -0.45 -8.20 0.40 -12.40 0.25 -1.35 0.30 -4.15 0.05 -6.50 -0.55 -5.65 -0.50 -15.50 0.05 -22.25 0.25 -3.40 0.25 -7.25 0 -9.75 -0.25 -2.25 -0.50 -9.05 -0.55 -15.10 -0.15 -10.30 -0.05 -11.20 0.95 -13.80 1.40 -3.55 3.70 -6.20 7.65 -8.90 l3.15 -2.10 20.55 0.05 c11.25 0.05 21.70 0.05 23.15 0.05 l2.65 -0.05 -2.55 -4.75 c-1.35 -2.65 -2.50 -5.30 -2.50 -5.90 0 -0.65 -0.60 -2.80 -1.30 -4.85 -1.85 -5.30 -3.75 -18.05 -3.60 -24.25 0.10 -6.70 -0.20 -7.25 -4.25 -7.25 -5.85 -0.05 -9.85 -3.25 -9.85 -7.85 0 -4.55 3.20 -6.65 9.95 -6.65 2.65 0 4.10 -0.20 4.45 -0.65 0.30 -0.35 0.90 -3.35 1.35 -6.65 1.25 -9.75 2.70 -14.90 5.70 -20.50 4.05 -7.50 6.80 -9.70 12.05 -9.70 3.95 0 5.65 0.80 9 4.20 2.90 3 4.25 3.45 5.75 1.85 0.45 -0.55 2.25 -1.85 3.95 -2.85 2.50 -1.55 3.65 -1.90 6.40 -2.10 2.95 -0.20 3.60 -0.05 6.25 1.35 1.60 0.85 3.25 2.05 3.65 2.70 4.40 6.95 7.35 15.20 9.05 25.35 0.70 4.30 1.40 7 1.90 7.40 0.40 0.35 2.15 0.60 4 0.60 7.25 0.05 10.55 1.90 10.55 5.95 0 1.75 -0.40 2.75 -1.50 4.25 -2.20 2.90 -2.95 3.25 -8.20 3.60 -3.35 0.25 -5 0.60 -5.45 1.10 -0.40 0.50 -0.55 2.15 -0.45 4.95 0.05 2.30 -0.10 4.55 -0.35 5.10 -0.30 0.50 -0.75 3.05 -1.05 5.60 -0.55 4.95 -1.45 8.75 -4.25 17.45 -2.40 7.40 -2.85 8.50 -4.15 10.50 l-1.10 1.75 6.05 0.35 c3.35 0.20 6.55 0.15 7.15 -0.05 1.35 -0.50 30.95 -0.30 33.55 0.20 2.65 0.55 6.65 4.75 8.95 9.45 l1.70 3.55 -0.15 36.25 c-0.10 19.95 -0.45 41.10 -0.75 47 -0.30 5.90 -0.50 16.25 -0.40 23 0.25 13.25 -0.80 52.70 -1.55 59.35 -0.50 4.55 -2 8.25 -4.60 11.50 -0.95 1.15 -2.45 3.15 -3.35 4.40 -0.95 1.35 -2.75 2.90 -4.35 3.80 -1.50 0.85 -2.85 1.75 -3 2 -0.45 0.65 -6.35 3.80 -7.85 4.15 -2.55 0.60 -3.05 1.60 -2.75 5.75 0.15 2.10 0.50 5.70 0.80 8.05 0.25 2.35 0.75 9.20 1 15.25 0.30 6.05 0.75 13.50 1.05 16.50 0.45 5.05 1.35 17.80 2.50 35.50 0.25 3.85 0.70 12.50 1 19.25 0.30 6.75 0.75 14.75 1 17.75 0.95 11.20 1.95 25.85 2.50 38.20 0.70 15.20 1.15 17.15 4.65 19.05 3.30 1.85 6.65 4.65 8.90 7.50 1.90 2.40 2.10 3 2.35 6 0.20 3.30 0.20 3.40 -1.20 4.30 -1.50 1.05 -1.70 1.05 -38.20 1.50 -8.10 0.10 -17.80 0.30 -21.50 0.40 -4.35 0.15 -7.40 0 -8.60 -0.35z"
```
